title: lindelofia anchusoides subsp. anchusoides
intro: Lindelofia anchusoides subsp. anchusoides, also known as the Burmese forget-me-not, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Boraginaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, due to its rich content of flavonoids and alkaloids. Lindelofia anchusoides subsp. anchusoides is traditionally prepared as an infusion or decoction, often consumed as a tea or used as a poultice for external applications.
